key_insights.insight: Inability to produce ketones during fasting can indicate liver issues.
key_insights.quote: If you can't make ketones or you're starving would be another or you're, you know, after a long period you're not feeling the benefits of fasting, that could be because of your liver.

key_insights.insight: The speed at which someone metabolizes alcohol can be an indicator of liver function, faster metabolism potentially being a sign of a healthier liver.
key_insights.quote: How quickly are you able to metabolize a toxin in your system and get it out of you.

key_insights.insight: A yellow tinge in the inner corner of the eye can be a sign of liver stagnation.
key_insights.quote: If the inside of your eye is yellow, according to iridology, which is the study of the eye as it relates to health, when the corner of the eye is yellow, that can be a sign of liver stagnation.

key_insights.insight: Dry, cracked feet can indicate poor circulation, possibly due to liver detoxification issues.
key_insights.quote: Bottom of your feet when they're dry and cracking is showing that you're not getting proper circulation down to your feet. And so it can be a possibility that the liver is not doing a good job of detoxing and getting toxins out.

key_insights.insight: A white or black coating on the tongue can indicate candida overgrowth and detoxification.
key_insights.quote: When you look at your tongue is it have a white coat on it? There's a white coat on it that can be a sign of Candida of you too much yeast in your system and your body's detoxing

key_insights.insight: Ridges on fingernails can be a sign of mineral deficiency.
key_insights.quote: When there's a lot of ridges in your nails or how quickly your nails are growing, that can be a sign of mineral deficiency.

key_insights.insight: Conventional farming practices deplete minerals in the soil, resulting in lower nutrient content in produce compared to food grown in regenerative farms.
key_insights.quote: The broccoli you have now has less vitamin and mineral content than the broccoli you had 10, 20, 30 years ago because of how the farmers are taking care of the soil.

key_insights.insight: Combining fasting with strategic mineral supplementation can enhance the body's detoxification and repair processes.
key_insights.quote: In that fasting window, we're starting to see glucose come down. We're starting to see the body repair and heal itself. Okay, now when they open up their eating window, we can have them add in minerals.

actionable_advice.advice: Check your ketone levels while fasting to assess liver function.
actionable_advice.how_to: Use a ketone meter by pricking your finger and testing your blood.

actionable_advice.advice: Examine the inner corner of your eyes for a yellow tinge to check for liver stagnation.
actionable_advice.how_to: Look in a mirror regularly, especially in the morning, to observe any yellowing near your nose.

actionable_advice.advice: Inspect the bottom of your feet for dryness and cracks as an indicator of circulation issues.
actionable_advice.how_to: Periodically check your feet for these signs, especially if you experience cold feet or other circulation problems.

actionable_advice.advice: Observe your tongue for white or black coating, especially during fasting, to monitor candida levels.
actionable_advice.how_to: Look at your tongue every morning upon waking to see if there are any discoloration

actionable_advice.advice: Examine your fingernails for ridges to assess your mineral status.
actionable_advice.how_to: Regularly check your fingernails and if you observe ridges begin supplementing with minerals and eating food from regenerative farms

actionable_advice.advice: Incorporate minerals during the fasted window to add support in.
actionable_advice.how_to: Take a mineral supplement or an electrolyte supplement in your fasting window.

memorable_stories: The speaker mentions looking at people's feet and menstrual blood to assess overall health.
Speaker explains their team built out an American studio to expand their reach.
contrarian_claims: The speaker suggests that metabolizing alcohol faster might be healthier than metabolizing it slowly.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 183: The Warning Signs Your Body Needs More Nutrients: Dr Mindy Pelz
